report.summary: Built and scaffolded a 3,100-word Morpho Protocol guide with interactive MetaMorpho Vault Explorer component, full SEO/structured data, breadcrumb navigation, and PUBLISH_QUEUE entry.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic: Morpho Protocol — top-3 DeFi lending protocol by TVL in March 2026 ($10B+), not yet covered on degen0x
Apollo Global ($938B AUM) signed deal for 90M MORPHO tokens (9% supply) over 48 months — landmark institutional adoption signal
Morpho V2 launching 2026: externalized rate pricing enables fixed-rate loans and custom loan terms for institutional desks
MetaMorpho vaults: $7B+ TVL managed by Gauntlet, Steakhouse Financial, Re7 Capital, B.Protocol
DeFi lending hit record $55B TVL in early 2026; modular lending architecture (Morpho Blue + vaults) is dominant new paradigm
Key differentiator vs Aave: immutable Morpho Blue core, permissionless market creation, full risk isolation per market
Secondary topic researched (queued for next cycle): Aerodrome Finance — Base chain leading DEX, $500M daily volume, Q2 2026 Ethereum expansion

sections.title: Content Created
items: Learn guide: 'Morpho Protocol Guide 2026: The Modular Lending Layer Taking Over DeFi' — ~3,100 words, 13 min read

10 sections covering: What Is Morpho, Morpho Blue mechanics & market params table, MetaMorpho vault curators, V2 changes, Institutional adoption (Apollo deal), Morpho vs Aave/Compound comparison table, MORPHO tokenomics with allocation chart, How to Use (3 audience paths), Risks (5 categories), FAQ
6-question FAQ targeting People Also Ask: morpho protocol, morpho blue, metamorpho, morpho vs aave, MORPHO token, safety
5 internal links: Aave V4 guide, DeFi Safety guide, RWA guide, Lending Comparison tool, DeFi Position Manager tool
Honest risk coverage: smart contract, vault curator, oracle manipulation, liquidation speed, token unlock risks

pages.notes: page.tsx at src/app/learn/morpho-protocol-guide/page.tsx; added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title tag: 'Morpho Protocol Guide 2026 — Modular DeFi Lending | degen0x' — 60 chars, primary keyword first
Target keyword: 'morpho protocol guide 2026' + 'morpho blue', 'metamorpho', 'morpho vs aave', 'MORPHO token', 'modular defi lending'
OpenGraph: article type with publishedTime/modifiedTime, social-optimized copy
Twitter card: summary_large_image
Schemas added: Article (wordCount 3100) + FAQ (6 Q&As) + BreadcrumbList via Breadcrumb component
Breadcrumb: Home → Learn → Morpho Protocol Guide 2026

sections.title: Interactive Component
items: MorphoVaultExplorer.tsx — 'use client', 339 lines, embedded in MetaMorpho section
Asset filter (USDC/WETH/wstETH/WBTC/All), sort by APY/TVL/Risk, click-to-expand vault detail panel
8 representative MetaMorpho vaults with curator, APY, TVL, risk level (color-coded), chain badges
Sanity checks passed: use client, imports, published-pages entry, component rendering
